name: TrustScoreAgent
description: Free, open reputation registry for AI microservices. Check a service's reliability before calling it, and rate it after. No account, no API key.

skills.name: Check service reputation
skills.description: Returns trust score (0-1), confidence, rating count and a per-dimension breakdown (availability, latency, conformity) for a microservice. Use this BEFORE calling any untrusted service. Maps to GET /v1/score?service=.
examples: What is the trust score of api.example.com?
Is did:web:translate.example.com reliable before I call it?

skills.name: Submit a service rating
skills.description: Rate a microservice after calling it, from interaction metrics (status code, latency, schema validity) and an optional signed receipt. Maps to POST /v1/rate.
examples: Record that api.example.com returned 200 in 143ms with a valid schema.

skills.name: List rated services
skills.description: Discover rated microservices sorted by trust score, with score and rating-count filters. Maps to GET /v1/services.
examples: List the top services with at least 10 ratings and a score above 0.8.
